violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Both kitchens have a build up on the filters and ANSUL system.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -The ceiling vent and a vent above the door frame for the dry storage area of the main concessions has a fuzzy build up and should be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Sharky's by the wave pool has a build up of grease on the floor behind the fryers.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -The pizza oven guard on the intake side was set to low and was skimming off the toppings of the pizza. This is causing extra work for cleaning and also is causing the finish product of pizza to be less desirable with inconsistent toppings.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Pizza prep table is out of service and this is causing a disruption in the process and preparation of menu items.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
